nasb.text: The Lord’s bond-servant must not be quarrelsome, but be kind to all, able to teach, patient when wronged,

esv.text: And the Lord’s servant must not be quarrelsome but kind to everyone, able to teach, patiently enduring evil,

cnv.text: 但主的僕人卻不可爭論，總要待人溫和，善於教導，存心忍耐，

ccb.text: 上帝的奴仆不可与人争执，总要温和待人，善于教导，心存忍耐。

csbs.text: 而主的奴仆不应该争斗；相反，要温和地对待所有的人，善于教导，忍受恶待，
